title: Restore purple/white theme and fix Draft screen blank state

requirements.summary: Restore the prior purple primary accent with white/light surfaces (and accessible dark-mode equivalents) via theme token and global-style fixes.
acceptanceCriteria: In light mode, primary accents (buttons, active nav items, highlights) render in the purple theme and primary surfaces render with a white/very-light background consistent with the prior look.
In dark mode, contrast remains accessible and the purple accent remains the primary highlight color.
No major UI surfaces/components rely on hard-coded colors that override the theme tokens (e.g., background/foreground/primary), preventing the theme from appearing inconsistent page-to-page.

file_operations.description: Revert/adjust global theme tokens to ensure a consistent purple primary and white/light surfaces in light mode, with accessible dark-mode equivalents. Also replace hard-coded surface colors in global classes (e.g., .paper-surface background/border/shadow) to use theme tokens instead of fixed values, preventing page-to-page inconsistency. (Use shadcn-ui token conventions already in the app; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.)

Confirm Tailwind color mappings consistently reference the global theme tokens (background/foreground/primary/etc.) so shadcn-ui-based components render purple accents and white/light surfaces across screens in light/dark modes. Verify no recent token mapping changes introduced non-purple primaries or inconsistent surface colors. (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.)

Audit/adjust any top-level layout surface classes to ensure app chrome (sidebar/header/background) uses theme token utilities (bg-background, bg-card, border-border, text-foreground) without hard-coded overrides that could break the restored purple/white look. (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.)

requirements.summary: Ensure the Draft option routes to a non-blank screen with a clear empty state and visible error handling with a retry/navigation action.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to the “Draft” option no longer results in a blank/empty screen (no missing content area).
If there is no data to show, the screen renders a visible empty state (title + short guidance text) rather than appearing broken.
If an error occurs while loading draft data, the screen renders a visible error state and a retry or navigation action instead of staying blank.

file_operations.description: Create a Draft screen that always renders meaningful content: (1) a title/header, (2) an English empty-state when no drafts exist, and (3) an English error-state with a retry action if loading/parsing draft data fails (e.g., localStorage read failure). Use shadcn-ui building blocks (e.g., Card/Alert/Button) for consistent styling. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire the Draft screen into the router so navigating to the Draft option loads the DraftWireframe component (no blank route). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add (or restore) a visible “Draft” navigation action that routes to the Draft screen, ensuring users can reliably reach it and see an active state when selected. Use existing shadcn-ui Button styling patterns for nav items. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
